entry.title: New: Bill 38 (Hawaiʻi County) — Passed Second Reading
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 19, ARTICLE 13, OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO REAL PROPERTY TAX CREDITS

Establishes a Private Road Tax Credit of up to $500 to be applied towards a homeowner’s real property tax bill when the homeowner expends at least $100 annually to maintain, repair, or improve a private roadway that is not restricted by a gate and is managed by a road maintenance organization.

Latest action: Council: Bill 38, Draft 4 passes second & final reading - 10/8/25

View on the council site
